productDisplayName: Puma Men Ferrari Logo Black Tshirts
description: Composition Black round neck short sleeved t-shirt made of 35% cotton and 65% polyester, that has green-white-red fabric tape on the inseam of the neckline, chequered pattern on the back, ferrari logo appliquéd on the left chest and right sleeve and puma's logo appliquéd on the back of the neck Fitting Regular Wash care Gentle machine wash with like colours in cool water at 30 degrees Do not bleach Do not tumble dry Warm iron Do not dry clean Sport this black t-shirt from puma, and all your friends will know a Ferrari fan is in their midst. The Ferrari logo looks regal on the chest, and the chequered pattern on the back reminds everyone of the Formula One flag. This red hot tee looks best with jeans and cool shoes. It's time to race! Model statistics The model wears size M in t-shirts Height-6.1', Shoulder-18"
